[Skip to content](https://innerpeace.vision/contact-us/#main)

# Contact Us

Have questions, suggestions, or just want to say hello? We'd love to hear from you! Our team is here to assist you in any way we can.

### Urgent Assistance

When time is of the essence, we're here to lend a helping hand.

Feel free to reach out to us anytime, even outside regular business hours, at 0419 853 811 for instant support.

### Care Inquiry

Our friendly and qualified team members are available to discuss the ideal home care options for you.

Call us at 0419 853 811 to explore the personalized care solutions we can offer.


### Brokerage Services

We offer brokered services in partnership with accredited home care providers in Bairnsdale. Contact us at 0419 853 811 to learn how we can assist you.

We also provide guidance on Self-Management options for care packages.


### Employment Opportunities

If you hold a Certificate III in Aged Care or you’re a registered nurse and have a passion for providing top-quality care in the community, we're interested in talking to you about joining our dedicated and innovative team.

Reach out to us at 0419 853 811 to learn how.

### Join Our Team

Additionally, You need to fill in the [DISC Personal Profile System](https://innerpeace.vision/disc-personal-profile-system/) and [Interview Form](https://innerpeace.vision/interview-form/), which are required forms during our application process.

## Let's connect!
